J

JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint - Class in com.medilabo.solutions.gateway.config
Custom entry point used by Spring Security for handling unauthorized access (HTTP 401).

JwtValidationFilter - Class in com.medilabo.solutions.gateway.config
Reactive WebFilter that intercepts incoming HTTP requests to validate JWT tokens.

Utility component for validating JWT (JSON Web Token) signatures.
